description: AI Integration specification. Defines all AI blocks, capabilities, and interfaces for the Learning Core. AI features embed directly in lessons, labs, projects, and simulators.

ai_summary.label: AI Summary
ai_summary.description: AI generates a dynamic summary of the current content at the user's learning level.

ai_explanation.label: AI Explanation
ai_explanation.description: AI provides deeper explanation of a specific concept, adapted to learning level.

ai_quiz.label: AI Quiz Generator
ai_quiz.description: AI generates quiz questions based on content. Adaptive difficulty.

ai_flashcards.label: AI Flashcards
ai_flashcards.description: AI generates flashcard deck from content. Supports spaced repetition.

ai_interview.label: AI Interview Questions
ai_interview.description: AI generates relevant interview questions based on content topic and career level.

ai_code_review.label: AI Code Review
ai_code_review.description: AI reviews code/configuration submitted by learner and provides feedback.

ai_architecture_review.label: AI Architecture Review
ai_architecture_review.description: AI reviews architecture diagram/description and provides feedback.

ai_recommendations.label: AI Learning Recommendations
ai_recommendations.description: AI recommends next content based on learner progress, weak topics, and goals.

ai_revision.label: AI Revision Suggestions
ai_revision.description: AI identifies topics that need revision based on spaced repetition and performance.

ai_difficulty_adaptation.label: AI Difficulty Adaptation
ai_difficulty_adaptation.description: AI adjusts content difficulty based on learner performance patterns.

mdx_syntax.description: AI blocks are embedded in MDX content using custom components
mdx_syntax.example:
<AIExplanation topic="VPC routing" level="auto" />
<AIQuiz topic="networking" count={5} difficulty="intermediate" />
<AICodeReview language="hcl" task="Create a VPC module" />

api_interface.description: AI blocks communicate with backend AI service via a unified API

future_features.ai_tutor: Full AI tutor that can answer any question about cloud engineering
future_features.ai_pair_programmer: AI pair programming for lab exercises
future_features.ai_assessment: AI grades projects and provides detailed feedback
future_features.ai_career_coach: AI career coaching based on skill profile and market trends
future_features.ai_content_generator: AI helps authors create and update content
